RTn) 2R)r RylfURd, [41414 3?P 4141^ ^tslIMIG sWwi, 1956 (1959 «ft 2, 414444 31 Mi JPtiR, 1426, 44 23) 4p 4T4 2241 4, 314bl f4R44] 44(44 Tju) fowtf R4 Rfct 3^-41 1030 3. 4R 3rf£RjR4l 1M44 "4 441T4T4 44 dltllsl M^d ePll I [44. 4. 1 2/15/2007-Rt3U<] 4414 414R, 4Tf44 feuiui; R4I Prrt 4R4 W, 3R1T4R4T, 4RI II, Refe 3, 44-4J4T (ii) 4' 3Tf4444T 47444! 44.34. 789(31), orIisI 20 414, 2009 KRT 944(416 fdlR 4R 4 3^1 4444 3ff41J44T 4. 44.3R 567 (31), 7TRtl4 1 5 41^, 201 1 £RT 4^4ld4d7 44144 Rid I 4dl I 3636 GI/2012 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY___________ [PartII—SEC.3(ii)] MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th September, 2012 S.0.2286(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 22A of the Chartered Accountants Act, 1949 (38 of 1949) the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, number S.O. 789(E), dated the 20th March, 2009, namely :— 2. In the said notification , in serial numbers (6) and (7), for the entries relating thereto, the following entries shall be substituted, namely :— “(6) ShriA.N. Raman —Member Plot 10, [Appointed under Section 22A of the Cost and PN. Muthukumaraswamy, SalaiBabyNagar, Works Accountants Act, 1956(23 of 1959)] 1st Main Road Velachery, Chennai-600042 (7) Shri Brij Mohan Sharma, ■ - —Member” B.M.Sharma and Associate [Appointed under Section 22A of the Cost and B-2,Neelsadan Apartments, Works Accountants Act, 1956 (23 of 1959)] 1426, Sadashiv Peth Opp. Pune Vidyarthi Griha, Pune-411030. 3. This notification shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. [F.No. 12/15/2007-PI] MANOJ KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Note: The Principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) vide number S.O. 789(E), dated the 20th March, 2009 and subsequently amended vide number S.O. 567(E), dated the 15th March, 2011. Primed by the Manager. Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mavapuri, New Dellii-I 10064 and Published by the Controller of Publiealions. Delhi-1 10054. -- 2 of 2 --
